content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.50% with VIX +6% to 18.49 signals defensive tone, but pharma and select financials are showing strong relative strength. Late session (14:40 IST, 49 min to close) — no new MIS entries, and CNC additions need to be high-conviction only. Book is +0.88% on the day with multiple winners; priority is locking in gains via SL trails rather than chasing new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1%, CMP 1042. Current SL 1027 is already above entry. Tighten SL to 1032 (just below today's intraday low of 1027.50 and S1 1029, ~1% below CMP — preserves trail-gap discipline). Q4 was strong (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%), trend intact. Lock in ~5% gain minimum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -1.4%, CMP 123.37 recovering toward entry 125.10 (intraday +0.5%). VIX rising +6% supports gold thesis. SL 119 (~3.5% below CMP) appropriate. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1788.00,
      "new_target": 1845.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.2%, CMP 1801.80, near 52w high 1851. Organon deal catalyst driving multi-day strength, pharma defensive. Current SL 1780 already above entry. Tighten slightly to 1788 (~0.75% below CMP, above entry, respects trail-gap). Q4 results May 21 — binary event watch but >3 sessions away. Will reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.50,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.8%, CMP 482.85. Current SL 478.50 already at acceptable trail level (~0.9% below CMP, above entry 469). Hit fresh 52w high 491.25 today but faded back to VWAP. No-op on SL itself — leaving as is. (Reclassifying as HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1% but day +10.88% on Q4 blowout (PAT +68%, GNPA improvement). Made new 52w high 201.48 then faded but holding above VWAP 197.91. SL 195 (~1.5% below CMP) is appropriate; no tightening yet — give the gap-up room to digest. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%, CMP 298.95. Made 52w high 307.45 today then faded -2.7% intraday — bearish reversal, mori#05 environmental stop-production order is fresh negative. SL 296 holds (~1% below). If breaks 296, exit triggers — keep as is, monitor Brent."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.55,
      "new_target": 24.95,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, CMP 23.89. Pharma sector strong (Sun Pharma Organon deal). Move SL from 22.85 to 23.55 (above entry 23.65... actually below entry by 10p — ~1.4% below CMP, within trail-gap discipline, locks in near-breakeven). Trail rule: P&L +1.3% so not yet at +2% threshold but ETF low-vol so tighter trail is justified."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%, CMP 937.95. Strong Q4 (PAT +22.8%, AUM +22%) but stock faded from 975 high to 937. SL 915 (~2.5% below CMP) is appropriate. Thesis intact — give room. Monitor whether 937 holds as support."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail tighter to lock 4.9% min gain"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL appropriate"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1788.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to lock ~3% gain; Q4 May 21 still beyond 3-session binary window"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 478.50 already at appropriate trail level above entry"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 gap-up needs digestion room; SL 195 appropriate"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish intraday reversal + Mori#05 regulatory; SL 296 holds the line"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.55,
      "reasoning": "Lower-volatility ETF; tight trail to near-breakeven"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 thesis intact; faded but holding; SL 915 gives appropriate room"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GESHIP BUY @ 1542 still OPEN from earlier — leave as is, do not stack. SYNGENE: skipped — FY26 PAT -20%, EBITDA margin -400bp, today's call may cap rally. Bearish supplementary research outweighs the +7.75% pop which already faded from 518 high to 474 (-8.5% intraday from high). RBLBANK: NIM compression 48bp YoY + credit-card stress flagged + already 21% above Emirates NBD open offer of 280 = limited upside. TATACHEM: 7.8x volume but Q4 results May 4 (binary event within 3 sessions) — no new entry per rule 11. BAJAJ-AUTO: Q4 results May 6 = binary event, skip new entry. Will revisit fresh on Day 12.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book deployed 42% — well within limits, plenty of dry powder. Today's session: focus is harvesting gains via trailing SLs on 3 winners (PNBHOUSING +6%, SUNPHARMA +4%, COALINDIA +3%). Late session + VIX rising + cautious tape = no new entries warranted. 5-day performance is poor (13% win rate, 0.5x profit factor) — discipline check: am I trading too small/wide on losers and too tight on winners? The wider trailing structure on winners today is the right adjustment. No cluster violations, no binary events within book in 3-session window (Sun Pharma May 21 is the closest). GESHIP open order remains valid for tomorrow's potential fill if shipping theme continues."
}
